title: astragalus globiflorus
intro: Astragalus globiflorus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which help to boost the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus globiflorus include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing overall well-being, making it a popular herb in modern herbalism. Astragalus globiflorus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support the body's natural defenses and promote relaxation.
